name: Pate De Chateau Blanc
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove half the bun from each White Castle hamburger and discard.
2. Place three of the remaining half-sandwiches in a food processor (pickle is optional) and add one egg and ½ cup milk. Pulse until the ingredients are chopped, but be careful not to puree. Empty into a bowl and repeat the process three more times.
3. Pack the mixture into an ungreased, standard-sized bread pan.
4. Place the pan in a larger pan and pour boiling water into the larger pan to a level half the depth of the bread pan.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for one hour.
6. Cool the loaf in the refrigerator; overnight is best.
7. Turn out on a plate, decorate with cream cheese, and cut pate into slices.
